title: Kung Pao Pork Casserole
description:
A Chinese-inspired casserole featuring rich, roasted pork, 
                   tossed in a spicy sauce and topped with roasted polish sausage.
instructions: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced Polish sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the Kung pao sauce, soy sauce, and brown sugar. Bring to a simmer.
Add the shredded pork to the skillet and stir to combine.
Transfer the pork mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top with cooked rice and sliced Polish sausage.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the casserole is hot and bubbly.
